title: Misc pod fixes
body: Fix a segfault and an issue where we were deleting the pod's /etc/hosts

comments.body:

Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/libpod/blob/master/OWNERS)~~ [mheon] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
ah beat me to both fixes. changes LGTM

I was carrying the segfault patch in a different PR as tests were failing on it.  I'll rebase on top of this.

/lgtm
I don't think the test failures are me - missing registries.conf in the test env?
Nevermind, found the problem - related to how we generated the command for infra containers.

this PR is to fix a regression in the tests and it is blocking other PRs:

/lgtm
